domestic.headline: Empowering businesses with reliable domestic payment solutions.
domestic.description: Handle payments easily within the UAE region in local currency and achieve faster settlement with zero operational complexity
domestic.feature1_desc: Receive and manage payments through wallets, cards and crypto within your domestic market
domestic.feature2_desc: Simplify fiat-to-crypto conversions and handle traditional currency transfers
domestic.feature3_desc: Manage, track and process payouts and get accurate updates from a single dashboard

domesticMain.headline: Simplify domestic payment acceptance
domesticMain.description: Handle incomes, manage payout and deal with transactions within your country quickly and reliably
domesticMain.hero_description: Move your money easily with the trusted infrastructure for your payment ecosystem

flexibleAPIs.headline: Be in charge of the payment experience with our APIs
flexibleAPIs.description: With only one endpoint, you can connect all Omnis Solutio's products and expand your business without any limitations
flexibleAPIs.feature1_desc: With all transactional and financial reporting in one place, save on engineering resources and reconciliation time
flexibleAPIs.feature2_desc: Our comprehensive API links all your payments efficiently. More so, your technical teams will cherish the strong documentation
flexibleAPIs.feature3_desc: Accepting payments from your customers and vendors is easier with less technical faults, safe data storage and multiple payment sources
flexibleAPIs.feature4_desc: You can also test payments to ensure smooth navigation, detailed documentation, introductory guides and a sandbox environment for payment testing

trust.left_desc: Our PCIDSS and RSCPS licenses ensure secure, regulated payments within and from the UAE. With complete data protection and Central Bank compliance, we are committed to your trust.
trust.left_badge: Save time on manual HR work
trust.left_footer: HR teams reduce admin by automating
trust.right_desc: With AI-driven KYC, fraud detection, AML monitoring and transaction oversights any breach or threats are blocked immediately. Our real-time behavioural analytics boost payment approvals to 97.50%.

whoWeAre.headline: UAE’s trusted platform for embedded payments and financial services
whoWeAre.bodyLine1: Omnis Solutio is inspired by the concept of ‘one-stop-platform’. By putting our customers first, we offer multiple financial products and solutions under one single roof to ensure efficiency and convenience. We are your complete payments destination: our aim is to provide businesses and individuals in the UAE with personalised services as per your needs.
whoWeAre.bodyLine2: Our forward-looking solution uses intelligent technology to align with your vision: more sales, reduced costs, rich data insights and improved customer experiences. Our cutting-edge hybrid payment processing solution simplifies fiat and crypto payments across the globe.

about.title: Omnis Solutio in the UAE
about.body: Our UAE operations serve as a hub for the wider MENA region. With a team of over 200 specialists based in Dubai and Abu Dhabi, we deliver world-class solutions tailored to local needs.

cta.title: Partner with Us in the UAE
cta.body: Join leading UAE organisations that trust Omnis Solutio to drive digital transformation and business growth.

daUseCase.report_desc: Designed to give a seamless domestic transaction with debit cards, credit cards, net banking, wallets and crypto. It tends to deliver fast, secure and flexible payment experiences for UAE businesses.
daUseCase.approval_desc: A major key advantage of our wallet infrastructure is complete visibility into your stored fiat and digital assets. We securely hold and provide instant access to fiat and crypto in a unified wallet infrastructure.
daUseCase.compliance_desc: A prime benefit is smooth and easy conversion. Convert fiat to digital currency and vice versa without complexity. It helps you to access real-time conversion to support regional and digital transactions from your wallet.

faq.headline: FAQs
faq.subheading: Explore here for more Frequently Asked Questions.
faq.general_q1: What products does Omnis Solutio provide?
faq.general_a1: Omnis Solutio provides a full suite of payment infrastructure products including merchant accounts, multi-currency wallets, cross-border rails, and open-banking integrations.
faq.general_a2: Omnis Solutio has an infrastructure layer that offers instant remittance through pay-ins, pay-outs and settlements.
faq.general_a3: Yes. Our platform is built with enterprise-grade encryption, multi-factor authentication, and continuous compliance monitoring.
faq.general_q4: How long does it take to process crypto payments?
faq.general_a4: Crypto payments are typically confirmed within seconds to a few minutes depending on the network and confirmation threshold.
faq.general_q5: Can Omnis Solutio be customised for my business?
faq.general_a5: Absolutely. Our white-label solutions allow full customisation of branding, workflows, and integrations to suit your business needs.
faq.onboarding_q1: How do I get started with Omnis Solutio?
faq.onboarding_a1: Simply book a demo or contact our sales team. We will guide you through verification, setup, and integration.
faq.onboarding_q2: What documents are required for onboarding?
faq.onboarding_a2: Standard KYB documents including company registration, director IDs, and proof of address are required.
faq.onboarding_q3: How long does the onboarding process take?
faq.onboarding_a3: Onboarding typically takes 2–5 business days depending on the completeness of your submitted documents.
faq.payouts_a1: We support bank transfers, crypto payouts, e-wallet disbursements, and local payment rails across 50+ countries.
faq.payouts_a2: Most payouts are processed within minutes. Bank transfers may take 1–2 business days depending on the destination.
faq.payouts_q3: Are there limits on payout amounts?
faq.payouts_a3: Payout limits vary by region and account tier. Contact our team to discuss higher limits for your volume.
faq.payouts_a4: Yes. Our platform supports scheduled and recurring payout configurations through the dashboard or API.
faq.settlement_a1: Funds collected are settled to your nominated account on a T+1 or T+2 cycle depending on your agreement.
faq.settlement_q2: Can I withdraw to multiple bank accounts?
faq.settlement_a2: Yes. You can configure multiple withdrawal destinations and assign rules for automatic distribution.
faq.settlement_q3: What currencies are supported for settlement?
faq.settlement_a3: We support settlement in 30+ currencies including USD, EUR, GBP, AED, and major Asian currencies.
faq.api_q1: Is there a sandbox environment for testing?
faq.api_a1: Yes. All accounts have access to a full sandbox environment with mock data and test credentials.
faq.api_q2: What authentication method does the API use?
faq.api_a2: Our API uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication with IP whitelisting for enhanced security.
faq.api_q3: Where can I find the full API documentation?
faq.api_a3: Full API documentation including endpoints, schemas, and code samples is available at our developer portal.

daSetup.headline: Simple set-up. Seamless Transaction.
daSetup.subheading: Specifically-built for UAE businesses: fast onboarding, intelligent routing for higher payment success rates and intuitive dashboards for whole transaction visibility and control.
daSetup.f1_desc: Get started quickly with our ready-to-use SDKs and REST APIs structure. Seamlessly integrate domestic payment acceptance across cards, net banking, wallets and crypto.
daSetup.f2_desc: Our responsive dashboards give you entire visibility into domestic transactions, balances and implementation. Observe activity in real time and process payments efficiently.
daSetup.f3_desc: Optimise domestic payment flows with our intelligent routing, which leverages AI and real-time data. Improve transaction success rates across cards, banking, wallets and crypto.
daSetup.f4_desc: Trace and track domestic payment performance with precise analytics and actionable insights. Make informed decisions with real-time reporting and business intelligence tools.
